nodes.label: Taxee System
nodes.rationale: Core system for DeFi portfolio agent that optimizes after-tax return, not gross performance. Core split: deterministic code does math; the LLM does judgment on structured inputs.

nodes.label: Tax First-Class Input Principle
nodes.rationale: Every rebalance, rotation, and harvest decision runs through a tax-cost model before execution. Tax is treated as a primary optimization target rather than an afterthought.

nodes.label: Lots as Unit of Truth Principle
nodes.rationale: Positions decompose into identifiable tax lots (acquisition date, cost basis, quantity, chain). Enables precise tax calculations and lot-specific strategies like HIFO.
nodes.norm_label: lots as unit of truth principle

nodes.label: Code Computes LLM Judges Principle
nodes.rationale: Thresholds, drift, lot selection, and gain/loss math are deterministic; ambiguous trade-offs go to the LLM. The LLM is not doing math - it receives structured inputs and applies judgment.

nodes.label: Data Aggregator
nodes.rationale: Pure data plumbing layer. Pulls from Circle Wallets, Arc ledger, price oracles, onchain signals. Outputs PortfolioSnapshot. No LLM involved.

nodes.label: LLM Goal Parser
nodes.rationale: Translates natural-language user goals into machine-readable UserPolicy constraints. Single Claude API call on onboarding.

nodes.label: LLM Regime Classifier
nodes.rationale: Classifies market regime (risk-on/risk-off/neutral) from structured onchain signals. LLM handles ambiguous middle ground better than hard thresholds.

nodes.label: Decision Engine
nodes.rationale: Deterministic code layer. Three modules: Rebalance Optimizer, Loss Harvest Scanner, Holding Period Tracker. Flags candidate actions. Fast, cheap, predictable - no LLM.

nodes.label: LLM Action Reasoner
nodes.rationale: The judgment layer. Decides whether to EXECUTE, DEFER, or SKIP flagged candidates. Weighs wash sale timing against regime direction against transaction cost - where LLM adds value over rules engine.

nodes.label: Execution Layer (Circle Stack)
nodes.rationale: Executes LLM-approved actions with minimal friction and full audit trail. Uses Circle Wallets, CCTP/Gateway, USYC parking, Paymaster gas abstraction.

nodes.label: Arc Ledger
nodes.rationale: Immutable disposal record → Form 8949 pre-fill. Writes every disposal with lot ID, cost basis, proceeds, gain/loss, timestamp, rationale.

nodes.label: Agent Entity
nodes.rationale: Core backend entity. Contains id, userId, status, wallets, policy, approval settings, deployment mode, notification channels, heartbeat interval.

nodes.label: UserPolicy
nodes.rationale: Machine-readable policy from natural language. Contains primaryObjective, harvestThresholdPct, maturationBufferDays, rebalanceAggressiveness, allowedActions.

nodes.label: PortfolioSnapshot
nodes.rationale: Aggregated view of positions, prices, realized YTD gains/losses, regime signals, and user policy. Consumed by downstream decision layers.

nodes.label: Lot Entity
nodes.rationale: Tax lot with id, acquiredAt, costBasisUsd, quantity, sourceTx, status, holdingPeriodDays. The unit of truth for tax calculations.

nodes.label: CandidateAction
nodes.rationale: Output of Decision Engine. Contains type (REBALANCE/HARVEST/PARK), priority, lots, estimated tax impact, gas cost, replacement asset, wash sale status.

nodes.label: Hosted Mode
nodes.rationale: taxee runs heartbeat on our infrastructure. TG + web notify. Circle executes. Default retail UX.

nodes.label: MCP Mode
nodes.rationale: User's OpenClaw/Claude Desktop agent calls taxee MCP tools on demand. User's agent owns notification channel. Power users, custom workflows.

nodes.label: Manual Approval Mode
nodes.rationale: Agent proposes → user must Execute/Defer/Skip before any transaction. Best for first-time users, large tax impact, learning the agent.

nodes.label: Delegated Approval Mode
nodes.rationale: Agent executes autonomously when Decision Engine + LLM Reasoner agree and policy guardrails pass. User receives post-action notify. Set-and-forget.

nodes.label: Loss Harvest Strategy
nodes.rationale: Scans positions for unrealized loss > threshold. Flags HARVEST with correlated replacement asset. Checks wash sale window (30 days).

nodes.label: Rebalance Strategy
nodes.rationale: Compares drift_cost vs tax_cost of HIFO disposal. If drift_cost > tax_cost, flags REBALANCE. Otherwise HOLD and re-check in 24h.

nodes.label: Maturation Park Strategy
nodes.rationale: Tracks days_to_longterm for each lot. If < 30 days AND lot has unrealized gain, flags PARK_IN_USYC - park for yield while aging toward long-term treatment.

nodes.label: Circle Programmable Wallets
nodes.rationale: MPC-secured wallet for execute tier. taxee signs via API with spend limits. Never stores user private keys - only circleWalletId and policy limits.

nodes.label: Circle CCTP
nodes.rationale: Cross-chain USDC burn/mint bridge for moving value between chains with consistent settlement.

nodes.label: USYC (USDC Yield Token)
nodes.rationale: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund. Parking destination for maturing lots - earn yield while lot ages toward long-term treatment.

nodes.label: Circle Paymaster
nodes.rationale: ERC-4337 paymaster for gas abstraction - users pay gas in USDC, not ETH.

nodes.label: Alchemy RPC
nodes.rationale: Used for live ETH + ERC-20 balance reading, transfer history import. Multi-chain: ETH mainnet, Sepolia, Base mainnet, Base Sepolia.

nodes.label: CoinGecko
nodes.rationale: Price feed for current prices + historical prices at lot acquisition date for cost basis calculation.

nodes.label: Telegram Bot API
nodes.rationale: Primary notification channel. Uses grammy/telegraf. Handles onboarding, rich opportunity notifications with inline buttons (Execute/Defer/Skip).

nodes.label: TaxeeLotRegistry
nodes.rationale: Immutable on-chain hash commitment per disposal lot. Backs Arc records with onchain fingerprint. Emits LotDisposed event. Deployed at 0x9a16c3d45A3e8Ad23152372405bf1F0dd58496ad on Arc testnet.

nodes.label: TaxeeExecutor
nodes.rationale: Atomic USDC → USYC park / USYC → USDC redeem per tax lot. Prevents partial execution where sell goes through but park doesn't. Deployed at 0x7fD85458A0958C5EB52234f3FF4f0C6bf7cC999c on Arc testnet.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.rationale: Primary database for Agent, wallets, lots, opportunities, LLM logs, heartbeats. Uses Drizzle ORM.

nodes.label: Redis
nodes.rationale: Caching layer for CoinGecko prices, regime state, lot snapshots.

nodes.label: Turborepo
nodes.rationale: Monorepo build system with npm/pnpm workspaces. Apps: api, agent, telegram-bot, mcp-server. Packages: shared, tax-engine, aggregator, llm, execution, compliance, notifications.

nodes.label: Fastify
nodes.rationale: Central REST + WebSocket API framework. All surfaces (web, Telegram, MCP) talk to apps/api.

nodes.label: Next.js
nodes.rationale: Frontend framework for dashboard. Routes: landing, onboarding, dashboard with fixture and real agent views.

nodes.label: Foundry
nodes.rationale: Solidity development toolchain for smart contracts. Uses forge for build, test, deploy.

nodes.label: User Onboarding Phase
nodes.rationale: Phase 1: Connect wallet → import history → set preferences → done (~2 minutes). Never repeat. Watch tier starts here (address only, no keys).

nodes.label: Heartbeat Phase
nodes.rationale: Phase 2: Hourly scan → agent reasons → notify on opportunity. Zero user effort. Runs continuously.

nodes.label: Action Loop Phase
nodes.rationale: Phase 3: Manual (Execute/Defer/Skip per opportunity) or Delegated (auto-execute within guardrails). User notified always.

nodes.label: Watch Tier Key Model
nodes.rationale: User keeps all keys. Agent can scan, reason, notify only. Address-only onboarding. TG bot works day one; user executes in own wallet.

nodes.label: Execute Tier Key Model
nodes.rationale: Circle Programmable Wallets or session key. Agent can execute approved transactions. User creates/funds Circle wallet; taxee signs via API.

nodes.label: Claude API
nodes.rationale: Used for Regime Classifier, Action Reasoner, Explanation Generator. All calls logged with promptVersion, token counts, latency. Zod schema validation.

nodes.label: HIFO Lot Selection
nodes.rationale: Highest-In, First-Out. Selects lots with highest cost basis first → minimizes realized gain. IRS-compliant when combined with specific identification at execution.

nodes.label: Wash Sale Rule Handling
nodes.rationale: 30-day window check since last buy of same asset. If window open, may defer harvest or park in USYC. Replaces with correlated asset (e.g., ETH→stETH, ρ=0.94) to maintain exposure.

nodes.label: Arc Testnet (Chain 5042002)
nodes.rationale: Deployment chain for TaxeeLotRegistry and TaxeeExecutor smart contracts. RPC at rpc.testnet.arc-node.thecanteenapp.com.
